en: Take a look at my face. Take a look at your heart.
We're speaking in English. You need to listen.
My new music. We don't get along.
Saving myself from myself is a job. Someone's got to do it.
ko: 나 자신으로부터 나를 구하는 건 누군가 해야 할 일이야
ja: 自分から自分を救うのは誰かがやらなきゃいけない仕事
zhTW: 把自己從自己手中拯救出來是某人必須做的事
vi: Cuu minh khoi chinh minh la viec ai do phai lam

en: If you say she asked you, she's going to do some more for show.
ja: 彼女はもっとやるに決まってる
vi: Co ay chac chan se lam nhieu hon

ja: 行け、行け、僕の魂を持って行け
zhTW: 去吧，去吧，帶走我的靈魂
vi: Di di, lay linh hon toi di

ja: お嬢さん、誰にも知られなくていい
vi: Co gai, khong ai can biet

en: Take her to the moon. Boy, you will make me tweak.
vi: Cau be, vi ban ma toi da thay doi

en: Boy, you will make me tweak.
vi: Cau be, vi ban ma toi da thay doi
